description: Create and deploy a custom Wazuh SCA policy named "Payment Gateway Hardening" (ID: 10005) to audit a proprietary application. The policy file must be located at /var/ossec/etc/sca/payment_gateway_audit.yml and include the description "Security audit for custom payment gateway". Implement checks for: permissions of 400 on /opt/payment_gateway/config/keys.pem (ID: 10006), root:root ownership of /opt/payment_gateway/logs (ID: 10007), and the presence of "debug=false" in /opt/payment_gateway/config/app.conf (ID: 10008). Enable and activate this policy within the Wazuh Manager configuration.
